entries.parsedImagePrompt: Close-up, eye-level angle. A young woman with a heart-shaped face, large double-lidded almond eyes, slender arched brows, small straight nose, full lips, long black hair stirred by the fan breeze, wearing thin loungewear (a lightweight sleeveless camisole and shorts), sits in front of a stationary electric fan. She lifts her chin to look up, a playful innocent smile spreading across her face, eyes crinkling with joy, body tilted slightly forward, hands clasped loosely in her lap. The background is a bright living room with a window on the right side casting soft natural light, white curtains half-drawn, a blurred view of a gray sofa and wooden coffee table, the fan in middle ground. Warm golden color tone, shallow depth of field (T2.8). Artwork in cgstyle_9b, ultimate CG texture with Iray skin rendering, realistic physical light and shadow, translucent rosy smooth skin texture, anime-to-CG transformation, high-detail skin surface, cinematic render quality, 2.5D semi-realistic style.
entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] A living room during daytime, with natural light entering from a window on the right. An electric fan stands motionless in the center, gray sofa and wooden coffee table on the left side, white curtains hang still. The room is static throughout.
[Characters] Tiểu Hy: An approximately 20-year-old woman with a heart-shaped face, large double-lidded almond eyes, slender arched brows, small straight nose, full lips, long black hair, slim build, wearing thin loungewear (a sleeveless camisole and shorts), sitting in front of the fan. She is in a playful and innocent mood, looking upward with a bright smile.
Shot 1 (Close-Up, 3s): Static camera, environment remains unchanged.
Action: Slow-motion. Tiểu Hy continues to hold her bright smile, her eyes crinkling gently at the corners, her chest rising with a soft breath, fingers loosely clasped in her lap micro-moving, her gaze fixed steadily upward.
